# line_visual_tolerance_preflight

- `status`: `blocked`
- `check_depth`: `structural_check_only`
- `blocked_reasons`:
  - `claim_not_preserved`
  - `consecutive_near_equivalent_groups_gt_1`
  - `core_evidence_mismatch_count_gt_0`
  - `replacement_material_not_extremely_close`
  - `user_material_needed_but_missing`
  - `viewer_inference_changed`
  - `visual_requires_guessing`
- `warnings`:
  - `极其相近素材不等于主题相近；局部降级不等于全程偏差。`
  - `达不到容差条件时必须 blocked，并等待用户补素材视频或图片，不允许硬剪。`
